visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair in a high bun, wearing a white sleeveless dress, stands in front of a bright yellow wall and a wooden cabinet with various items. She looks directly at the camera with a playful expression, leaning her arms on a white table. (2) The scene shifts to a medium shot as she sits at the table with a bowl of noodles and a bowl of soup. She holds red chopsticks and points a finger at the camera. (3) Close-up of the noodles as she pours bright red chili sauce from a red squeeze bottle over them. (4) She is seen eating the noodles enthusiastically with chopsticks, followed by a celebratory sparkle effect around her head as she finishes. (5) She holds up an empty bowl to the camera, smiling. (6) She introduces pan-fried buns on a small black skillet, again squeezing red sauce onto them and eating one. (7) She eats a bowl of thick noodle soup (Da Mian Geng), pouring sauce first, and then showing the empty bowl. (8) Transition to her holding two large Zespri kiwis in front of her face. (9) She uses a spoon to scoop and eat the yellow kiwi fruit. (10) A full-screen graphic appears with green and white branding, showing event details, dates, a QR code, and images of kiwis. (11) Back to the woman, she holds two kiwis and waves at the camera with a cheerful smile against the yellow background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 吃台中 Style 早餐. [Slogan]: Go!. (2) [Subtitle]: (早餐?) +辣辣椒醬 炒麵+豬血湯. (3) [Variety]: 完食!. (4) [Subtitle]: 水煎包 +辣辣椒醬 擠進去. (5) [Subtitle]: 大麵羹. (6) [Slogan]: 你的早餐 夠營養嗎? 早餐吃這樣 還不夠嗎?. (7) [Subtitle]: 奇異果. [Logo]: Zespri. (8) [Subtitle]: 一个高營養密度的 Zespri 奇異果 一口快充 超過 20 種營養. (9) [Slogan]: 開啟整天的活力. (10) [Logo]: Zespri KIWIFRUIT. [Slogan]: 快充! 全台早餐營養 GO. (11) [Slogan]: 活動日期 2025年5月15日-6月14日. 活動地點 台北捷運中山站/大安站 餐車 (每日早上 7:00-11:00). (12) [Slogan]: 活動辦法 掃描 QR Code 加入 Zespri 官方 LINE 投票選出你心中的 No.1 在地早午餐, 即可免費兌換一顆 Zespri 陽光金圓頭. (13) [Logo]: Zespri. [Slogan]: 奇異果一顆! 你挺在地早餐 Zespri 挺你營養快充! 趕快去換喔!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with fair skin, black hair tied in a bun, wearing a white halter-neck summer dress and silver rings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright yellow interior wall with a wooden shelving unit containing books and awards. A promotional graphic background for the second half.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice introduces the breakfast with upbeat synth-pop music. (2) Sudden 'Ding' SFX marks the start of the food presentation. (3) Continuous upbeat music with audible eating/slurping sounds and short 'Pop' SFX during cuts. (4) Vocal shift to high excitement when showing the empty bowl, accompanied by a sparkly 'magic' sound effect. (5) Repetition of 'Ding' and 'Pop' sounds as different food items are introduced. (6) Transition at 33s with a loud 'Whoosh' SFX. (7) A clear male voice takes over the narration, delivering promotional information with professional clarity over the same upbeat BGM. (8) Digital 'bleep' and battery-charging SFX during the nutritional description. (9) Final female sign-off with a bright tone and fading music.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase traditional Taichung breakfasts and promote a Zespri kiwi event as a nutritional supplement to common local meals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, brand logos, a male narrator explaining a specific promotional event, and a call to action with a QR code.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy, social-media-native editing style with frequent cuts and on-screen text to maintain engagement before pivoting to a commercial promotion.
